description: AI Craftspeople Guild white-paper UDT (User Defined Type) template. Each ingested white paper becomes an instance of this UDT. Modeled on Ignition-style UDTs: a type definition with parameters (authored metadata) and tags (system-derived fields).

publication_date.description: ISO date or free-form date string

site_href.description: Existing rendered page on the site, if any, e.g. ai-harness.html

tags.name: id
tags.description: Stable slug identifier, derived from title if not provided

tags.name: original_path
tags.description: Path to the untouched source file under white-papers/originals/

tags.name: original_hash_sha256
tags.description: Content hash used to detect re-ingest

tags.name: body
tags.description: Normalized markdown body (may be empty for csv rows)

tags.name: instance_path
tags.description: Path to the JSON instance file under white-papers/udts/instances/

tags.name: ingested_at
tags.description: UTC ISO timestamp when the instance was produced

tags.name: schema_version
tags.description: UDT template version this instance conforms to
